sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25020" key="diakosionta/kis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διᾱκοσι-οντάκις</orth>, <sense id="n25020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">two hundred times,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
